arts.ttl: Santiago Gimenez: “Milan Was Always My Dream”
arts.sum: AC Milan's latest signing Santiago Gimenez has expressed his excitement about joining the Rossoneri, describing it as a dream come true. The post Santiago Gimenez: “Milan Was Always My Dream” appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: OFFICIAL: AC Milan Sign Riccardo Sottil
arts.sum: AC Milan have officially announced the signing of Riccardo Sottil from Fiorentina. The 25-year-old Italian forward joins the Rossoneri on a loan deal with an option to make the move permanent, adding depth and versatility to Milan's attacking lineup. The post OFFICIAL: AC Milan Sign Riccardo Sottil appeared first on FootItalia.com.

Roma have officially confirmed the loan transfer of Swedish fullback Samuel Dahl to Benfica, marking a significant move for the young player seeking more playing time. The post OFFICIAL: Samuel Dahl Joins Benfica appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Chelsea's Felix close to joining AC Milan on loan
arts.sum: Chelsea midfielder Joao Felix is close to joining Serie A club AC Milan on loan until the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Official: Roma complete triple deal for Nelsson, Gourna-Douath and Salah-Eddine
arts.sum: Roma managed to complete their triple deal on deadline day, signing Victor Nelsson, Anass Salah-Eddine...

Bologna have secured the services of Davide Calabria on loan from AC Milan until June 30, 2025. The 28-year-old right-back embarks on his first venture away from the Rossoneri after 11 seasons with their first team. The post OFFICIAL: Bologna Sign Davide Calabria appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Official | Roma sign Lucas Gourna-Douath on loan
arts.sum: AS Roma have signed Red Bull Salzburg midfielder Lucas Gourna-Douath (21) on loan, both clubs have announced. The former Saint-Etienne youth product has joined Roma on a loan move with…

arts.sum: Milan have officially completed the deadline day swoops for Joao Felix on loan from Chelsea,...

AC Milan have officially secured the signing of Warren Bondo from AC Monza in a permanent transfer that marks a significant moment in the final hours of the January 2025 transfer window. The 22-year-old midfielder arrives as a direct replacement for Ismael Bennacer, who is set to depart for Marseille. The post OFFICIAL: Milan Sign Warren Bondo appeared first on FootItalia.com.
